spec_match.rationale: Excellent use of media element pseudo-classes (:playing, :paused, :muted) paired with :has() parent selectors.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive. Includes a working base64-encoded tone audio element, dynamic content-label toggling, CSS glows, and a functional baseline API capability probe box.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned. Perfect showcase proving complex visual state transitions can be built with zero JavaScript layout handlers.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes silent data-URI audio definitions ensuring the player interacts without external network audio loading states.

references.rationale: Includes a direct ChromeStatus entry reference link.

design_system.rationale: Clean, minimal border card layout utilizing standard public/styles.css components.

summary: The media-mood-board is an exceptionally elegant, JS-free media styling demo showcasing playing, paused, and muted visual state transitions.
